other_observers: None; I was the original finder this year, there was LEBI seen here in 2008 and 2009 (Photographed).
specific_location: At the north west pond in Running Deer Natural area. It is just south of Prospect Ave and just east of the Poudre River.
description: I saw a small heron like bird flying from the north to the south. The first thing I noticed was how small it was, which then ruled out all the other herons other than Green Heron and Least Bittern. Then I saw that it had a white belly and a light brown breast and half of the wings. It had a dark cap. Also, a light bluish colored back and wing tips. It had yellow legs.Behaviors: I saw the bird flying from the north end of the pond to the south end. It landed in the same area where I observed the birds in both 2008 and 2009.Call: Didn’t hear itPlumage: Adult
